recommended_actions.title: Room temperature below optimal range
recommended_actions.description: Current room avg is 15.6°C — most crops need 18-24°C. Check HVAC settings, insulation, and heater capacity.
recommended_actions.recommended_action: Increase room temperature to at least 18°C
recommended_actions.impact: Slow growth, reduced yield, potential cold stress

recommended_actions.title: Humidity below optimal range
recommended_actions.description: Current room avg is 28.8% — most crops need 50-70%. Low humidity causes leaf tip burn, slow transpiration, and wilting.
recommended_actions.recommended_action: Add humidifier or increase misting frequency
recommended_actions.impact: Leaf damage, reduced growth rate, tip burn on greens

recommended_actions.title: Run periodic device scans
recommended_actions.description: Set up regular SwitchBot device scans to keep sensor data fresh and detect offline devices early.
recommended_actions.recommended_action: Ask Cheo to scan devices weekly
recommended_actions.impact: Better monitoring reliability, early detection of sensor failures

recommended_actions.title: Start recording harvests
recommended_actions.description: No harvest data found. Recording harvests enables yield tracking, cycle analysis, and revenue forecasting.
recommended_actions.recommended_action: Tell Cheo when you harvest — crop, quantity, zone
recommended_actions.impact: Enables yield analysis, cost-per-tray metrics, and succession planning
